hero.headline: Collaborative AI-Powered Scientific Editor.
hero.subtext: Clarity helps researchers, professors and students to compose and collaborate on their research papers faster. (Supports LaTeX & Typst)
hero.product_hunt_alt: {clarity} - AI powered overleaf alternative | Product Hunt
features.section_subtitle: Everything you need to write standard-setting documents, without the standard headaches.
features.ai_copilot_desc: Your personal research assistant. Generate complex tables, fix compilation errors instantly, or rewrite sections for clarity—all without leaving the editor.
features.compilation_desc: Forget Pkg updates. Our cloud engine handles packages automatically and compiles your PDF in milliseconds.
features.sync_desc: Collaborate with your team as if you’re in the same room. Live cursors, instant updates, zero conflicts.
features.preview_desc: See your document come to life as you type. Instant compilation with zero lag, powered by our cloud infrastructure.
features.edit_desc: Make changes with confidence. Powerful editor with intelligent autocomplete, syntax highlighting, and real-time error detection.
features.anywhere_desc: Browser-based means device agnostic. Continue your thesis on your iPad or review papers on your phone.
pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.subtitle: Start free, then upgrade when you are ready to collaborate at scale.
meta.title: {clarity}
meta.description: AI Powered Overleaf Alternative, Supports LaTeX, Typst...
